payer_facing_baseline_single_surgical_im.scope: single wisdom tooth below the gumline

payer_facing_baseline_four_surgical_with.scope: all four wisdom teeth below the gum line and up to one hour of general anesthesia

payer_facing_baseline_four_non_surgical_.scope: all four wisdom teeth fully erupted, non-surgical removal

public_manhattan_anchor_total_case.scope: typical Manhattan public estimate depending on complexity

cost_drivers: local anesthesia versus sedation or general anesthesia
